title: Fix Transaction Scope selector visual feedback and remove redundant 'Skip Deposits' setting

tasks.description: Add JS change listener on scope radio inputs to toggle .selected class on parent .scope-pill label
Remove 'Skip Deposits from categorization' checkbox HTML (public/index.html)
Remove autoSkipDeposits const declaration and all save/load wiring in public/index.html
Update scope selector <small> text to remove 'Honors Skip Deposits' reference
Remove skipDeposits checks from #processUncategorizedTransactions and #processAllTransactions (scope handles filtering)
Change AutoCategorizationService default skipDeposits to false and mark autoCategorize() skip logic as legacy

notes: Scope selector now fully replaces the old Skip Deposits toggle. When scope is 'Withdrawals', deposits are filtered. When scope is 'Both', all transactions are processed with no automatic skip.
